clinical_blockers: The legacy combined candidiasis or bacterial-vaginosis diagnosis label is not supported as a patient diagnosis.
Pelvic and speculum examination findings, STI testing, pregnancy testing, urinalysis, medication, partner treatment, and fixed post-treatment intervals remain unsupported.
The source is limited to Dubai telehealth and a candidiasis-compatible subset.
Qualified clinician review has not been completed.
